sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation /\et, 2015. hon title
(I) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Appropriation
sections.text:
there may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic,
uch monies, not exceeding in the aggregate fifty-three billion, one
hundred and thirty-five million, eight hundred and twenty-five
thousand, three hundred and sixty four kwacha a may be required
- for the services of the Republic during the fimrncial year ending on
31 st December, 2016.
(2) The monies referred lo in subsection (I) shall be
appropriated to the services of the Republic specilicd in the second
column ofthe First cheduleand the econd Schedule respectively,
in amounts not exceeding the amounts indicated in the third column
of the First chedule and econd chcdule respectively.
(3) On the written authority of the ecretary to the Treasury,
the amounts shown under the sub-heads in the f-irst Schedule and
under the programmes in the econd Schedule, may be varied,
except that the amounts appropriated to each sub-head in the First
Schedule and the amounts appropriated to each programme in the
econd chedul e shall not be thereby altered.
